name: O' Atar
description: Disables Impact waves effect for 10 seconds when purchased.

name: O' Airyaman
description: Disables packet collisions in the network for 5 seconds.

name: O' Anahita
description: Resets noise on all packets currently in the network.

name: Scroll of Aergia
description: Stops packet acceleration for 20 seconds at selected point.

name: Scroll of Sisyphus
description: Moves a non-reference system within specified radius.

name: Scroll of Eliphas
description: Centers packets on wire for 30 seconds at selected point.
